title: patrinia scabra
intro: Patrinia scabra, also known as common selfheal or bai jiang cao in Chinese, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Patrinia scabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and arthritis, and treat various infections such as pneumonia and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
